title: Fix class extend references between queues

features.name: class inheritance with unpacked array passed to base-class function
features.description: Code should include a derived class extending a base class, where an unpacked array of derived class instances is passed to a function that expects a base class array argument

features.name: class extend with VlClassRef in VlQueue template
features.description: Code should include a class inheritance relationship where a derived class reference is used as a template argument in VlQueue and must convert to a base class reference in the template
